+            Builds a scope and request body into a WSGI environ object.
+            """
+        environ = {}
+    
+        # HTTP method
+        environ['REQUEST_METHOD'] = scope.get('method', 'GET')
+    
+        # Script name and path info (usually empty for root)
+        environ['SCRIPT_NAME'] = ''
+        environ['PATH_INFO'] = scope.get('path', '')
+    
+        # Query string
+        environ['QUERY_STRING'] = scope.get('query_string', b'').decode('latin-1')
+    
+        # Server and port information
+        environ['SERVER_NAME'] = scope.get('server', ['localhost', 80])[0]
+        environ['SERVER_PORT'] = str(scope.get('server', ['localhost', 80])[1])
+    
+        # HTTP version
+        environ['SERVER_PROTOCOL'] = 'HTTP/' + scope.get('http_version', '1.1')
+    
+        # WSGI specific variables
+        environ['wsgi.version'] = (1, 0)
+        environ['wsgi.url_scheme'] = scope.get('scheme', 'http')
+        environ['wsgi.input'] = body
+        environ['wsgi.errors'] = sys.stderr
+        environ['wsgi.multithread'] = False
+        environ['wsgi.multiprocess'] = False
+        environ['wsgi.run_once'] = False

+        # Content type and length

+            if name == 'CONTENT_TYPE':
+                content_type = value

+            # Add HTTP_ prefix for most headers

+        # Set content type and length

+            environ['REMOTE_ADDR'] = scope['client'][0]
